stemHtml: What subject does the Tokyo Convention deal with regarding damage?

options.a: The convention does not deal with any of the listed damage scenarios.
options.b: Damage caused within a Contracting State by any aircraft regardless of registration.
options.c: Damage caused within a Contracting State or on a ship/aircraft registered there by an aircraft registered in another Contracting State.
options.d: Only damage caused within a Contracting State by an aircraft registered in another Contracting State.
